name: Ramp

composio_registry_match.name: Ramp
composio_registry_match.description: Ramp is a platform that helps you manage your finances, track your income and expenses, and get insights into your business

description: Ramp is an all-in-one spend management and corporate card platform that automates expense reporting and finance operations.
notes: Ramp provides a well-documented Developer API using API key authentication (Personal Access Tokens). The API surface covers cards, transactions, reimbursements, and accounting integrations.
